title: Rasa Roadmap
note: Projected from the current docs/work/ledger.md backlog.

milestones.title: Metadata role normalization
milestones.summary: Analyzer emits normalized metadata role facts for type hints, function return hints, docs, layout hints, shape claims, and unsupported metadata diagnostics. Purity stays derived-only; function-level capability policy is not admitted.
requiredCapabilities: Authority: docs/proposals/010-language-operational-spine/01-language-constitution.md

Acceptance: Analyzer emits normalized metadata role facts for type hints, function return hints, docs, layout hints, shape claims, and unsupported metadata diagnostics. Purity stays derived-only; function-level capability policy is not admitted.

milestones.title: Package/provider authority algebra

milestones.title: Structured fact authority
milestones.summary: Facts record evidence source, level, scope/dominance, assumptions, dependencies, and authorization; raw metadata does not authorize optimization.

Acceptance: Facts record evidence source, level, scope/dominance, assumptions, dependencies, and authorization; raw metadata does not authorize optimization.

milestones.title: Compiler outcome API
milestones.summary: Source-visible rasa.compiler/check-source returns versioned Rasa outcome data with typed reports and diagnostics; expected failures are values, not Rust stack traces; file authority stays outside the compiler API.

Acceptance: Source-visible rasa.compiler/check-source returns versioned Rasa outcome data with typed reports and diagnostics; expected failures are values, not Rust stack traces; file authority stays outside the compiler API.

milestones.title: Boundary movement and WMP inspection
milestones.summary: Plans expose movement mode, WMP profile, guard/fallback, runtime-Wasm allocator path, WMP-2 candidate/refusal causes, and boundary materialization cost where relevant.
requiredCapabilities: Authority: docs/proposals/010-language-operational-spine/04-runtime-target-ecosystem.md
Acceptance: Plans expose movement mode, WMP profile, guard/fallback, runtime-Wasm allocator path, WMP-2 candidate/refusal causes, and boundary materialization cost where relevant.

milestones.title: WMP-2 image data-plane proof
milestones.summary: First slice has a manifest-driven Sobel proof under examples/proofs/sobel/, generated browser packaging under web/proofs, browser runtime-Wasm checksum parity, visible canvas output, boxed/WMP-2 target cost reporting, and source-local plan/packed-data-refusal for counted-loop pressure. The packed-loop contract slice now adds examples/proofs/packed-loop/: packed-copy.ras admits the first one-dimensional u8 WMP-2 packed-linear candidate through compiler-recognized rasa.array intrinsics, ^:rasa/packed, induction-indexed read/write, and array/persistent!; buffer-escape-refused.ras, index-shape-refused.ras, counted-refused.ras, and refused.ras keep the strict refusal path; inferred.ras preserves unfenced analyzer-driven optimization. Remaining pressure: specific escape/sealing diagnostics, broader dtypes and shapes, K-mer bitmask range facts, Sobel affine indexed-buffer facts, browser execution track, guard placement, boundary movement reporting from compiler facts, and measured fallback comparison.
requiredCapabilities: Authority: docs/proposals/010-language-operational-spine/09-hard-problems-and-proof-workloads.md

Acceptance: First slice has a manifest-driven Sobel proof under examples/proofs/sobel/, generated browser packaging under web/proofs, browser runtime-Wasm checksum parity, visible canvas output, boxed/WMP-2 target cost reporting, and source-local plan/packed-data-refusal for counted-loop pressure. The packed-loop contract slice now adds examples/proofs/packed-loop/: packed-copy.ras admits the first one-dimensional u8 WMP-2 packed-linear candidate through compiler-recognized rasa.array intrinsics, ^:rasa/packed, induction-indexed read/write, and array/persistent!; buffer-escape-refused.ras, index-shape-refused.ras, counted-refused.ras, and refused.ras keep the strict refusal path; inferred.ras preserves unfenced analyzer-driven optimization. Remaining pressure: specific escape/sealing diagnostics, broader dtypes and shapes, K-mer bitmask range facts, Sobel affine indexed-buffer facts, browser execution track, guard placement, boundary movement reporting from compiler facts, and measured fallback comparison.

milestones.title: Suspension boundary diagnostics
milestones.summary: may-suspend propagates through capability calls and unsupported suspension in non-suspending/performance-sensitive contexts gives a precise diagnostic.

Acceptance: may-suspend propagates through capability calls and unsupported suspension in non-suspending/performance-sensitive contexts gives a precise diagnostic.

milestones.title: Tiny WIT projection from checked facts
milestones.summary: Generated WIT is no more precise than proven or checked facts; hinted-only facts require guard, dynamic encoding, or refusal.

Acceptance: Generated WIT is no more precise than proven or checked facts; hinted-only facts require guard, dynamic encoding, or refusal.
